today.label: Re-entry day: Active Recovery (Reduced-load)
today.planText: SESSION PLAN Strength B Push-up Complex (3 rounds) · Wide×15? Std×15? Diamond×12 A complex links multiple movements together before you rest. Band Chest Press (one arm) · 3×12 each Unilateral press challenges core stability. Band Bent-over Row · 4×15 Row to chest. Posture for racing. Band Overhead Press · 4×12 Stand on band. Full extension. Band Pull-Apart · 4×20 Straight arms. Rear delts + posture. Band Lateral Raise · 3×12 Slow lower. Don't shrug. Hollow Body Hold · 4×30 sec THE abs exercise. Lower back pressed down, legs low. Bicycle Crunch · 3×20 each side Controlled. Don't yank the neck. Leg Raise · 4×15 Lower abs. Slow lower, don't let them crash.
